title: NIT Warangal – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has released recruitment for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, or relevant M.Sc qualifications can apply through email. The last date to submit the application is 31-05-2026 through the official NIT Warangal website.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech. or B. E. or Equivalent degree in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Mechanical Engineering and M. Tech. or M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering and related fields with first class with 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/OBC-NCL/GEN-EWS category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA for candidates under SC/ST/PwD category. GATE score is NOT mandatory., B.Tech. or B.E. or Equivalent degree in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Mechanical Engineering and at least CGPA of 8.0/10 or 75% of marks under GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% for candidates under SC/ST/PwD category. GATE score is NOT mandatory., M.Sc. in Physics/ Materials Science/ Nanoscience and Nanotechnology with M.Tech. in Materials Science/ Metallurgy/ Nanoscience and Nanotechnology/ Ceramic Engineering/ Surface Engineering with minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG (wherever applicable) for GEN/ GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ ST/ PwD category. All candidates must have qualified in GATE/ UGC/ CSIR/ INSPIRE/ NET., M.Sc. in Physics/ Materials Science/ Nanoscience and Nanotechnology/ Ceramic Engineering/ Surface Engineering with minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG (wherever applicable) for GEN/ GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ ST/ PwD category. All candidates must have qualified in GATE/ UGC/ CSIR/ INSPIRE/ NET.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
